project_type: Google Colab notebook-style monolithic Python script for AI video generation (LTX-2 pipeline)
build_system: None (Colab notebook). Validation via py_compile and AST checks.
test_framework: No test framework present. Validation is py_compile + import checks.
verification_instructions: 1. Run py_compile on every .py in ltx_pro/ to confirm valid syntax. 2. Run 'python3 -c "import ltx_pro"' to confirm the package is importable without runtime errors (some imports like torch/comfy will fail in sandbox - that is expected, use try/except guards). 3. Verify LTX_PRO.py itself passes py_compile.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a pure refactor. Python 3.9 is available.
environment_constraints: No CUDA/GPU available. No ComfyUI, torch, transformers, etc. installed. All modules MUST pass py_compile independently (syntax-valid). Runtime imports of heavy dependencies (torch, transformers, comfy, etc.) should be guarded with try/except or conditional imports for testing purposes. The actual runtime environment is Google Colab with full GPU.
contribution_requirements: Preserve ALL existing functionality. Keep @param annotations in LTX_PRO.py. Each module must have __all__ exports and docstrings on all public classes/functions. No circular imports.
key_patterns: 1. ComfyUI node pattern: NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS['NodeName']() -> node.FUNCTION() -> get_value_at_index(result, 0). 2. VRAM management: load model -> use -> del -> aggressive_cleanup(). 3. Config via module-level globals with @param annotations. 4. Feature toggles (ENABLE_*) gate functionality. 5. Functions use globals().get() for default values from notebook cells.
directory_structure: Root: /projects/sandbox/ltx/ contains LTX_PRO.py (8670 lines monolith), LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI node), LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI node), JSON workflow files. Target: create ltx_pro/ package with 16 modules.
